text:
おいおい本当に大丈夫なのか！？
あんなの絶対、倒せないって！

いやもちろん
倒してみてほしいけどさ……

おたくはマジで考え方が前向きだな。
みんながおたくを信頼する理由が
さすがにオレにもわかってきたぜ。

とはいってもオレには
ここで応援することしかできねえけど
頑張ってくれよな！

Uh, pal, you sure you know what you're doin'
here? Not to be a downer here, but no way is
that thing goin' down!

But, ah, I guess I'd be pretty into seein' you
try anyway.

You really are... let's call it "proactive."
Maybe to a fault. But it ain't hard to tell why
everyone has so much faith in ya.

Guess I'll just be hootin' and hollerin' for ya
from the sidelines like always. But you go get
'em! Give it all ya got, pal!
